goal: Fix the state-machine bug that swallowed user continuation after barge. The TTS finally-branch unconditionally reset _finals_gate_until to monotonic+POST_TTS_COOLDOWN_S — overriding the open gate the barge had just set. Now only resets if the gate is still in the future (i.e. natural TTS end), preserving the barge-open state. Also loosen _is_bot_echo: require >= 2 words for echo suppression so 1-word user barges ('stop', 'yes', 'no', 'wait') are never silently dropped even if they appear in bot text.
